examples.title: Optional and nullable fields
examples.when: Use Optional[T] with json:",omitzero" for an omittable non-null property; use Nullable[T] for a required property that may be null.

examples.title: Enums
examples.when: Use field-level enum options when a containing schema should expose named constants as allowed values.

examples.title: Interfaces and discriminators
examples.when: Use explicit interface options to enumerate implementations and choose the discriminator property for an interface field.

examples.title: Slices of interface unions
examples.when: Use a direct []I field when each array element is one implementation of a registered interface union.
